name: The Dogleg Golf Club
about: The Dogleg Golf Club is a private, members-only facility located in Lolo, Montana. It features three spacious simulator bays equipped with Trackman technology, offering 24/7 access via key cards and an app-based reservation system. The venue emphasizes a premium, flexible golf experience without traditional country club constraints like dress codes or long-term commitments, catering to both serious golfers and casual players seeking an all-weather practice environment.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to premium Trackman simulator bays
Over 450 elite golf courses available in the Trackman library
Flexible membership model without long-term commitments
Laid-back, club-like atmosphere with no dress code
Ability to host private events and bring non-members as guests

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food and drinks are welcome

simulator_hardware.notes: Three oversized bays with 17ft width and 10.5ft height

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Members are expected to bring their own clubs for simulator sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, outside food and drinks are allowed, including alcohol.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole round varies depending on player pace and bay availability.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Dogleg hosts family nights and welcomes children with games and activities.
